Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor with 168 days overdue (#4460); likely system/process issue rather than insolvency given market position—enforce strict 45-day terms going forward.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Retail chain currently 11 days overdue; tighten to 30 days COD/prepay to protect cash flow during peak season ramp.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer 57 days overdue; typical export DSO is 45–60 days, but this breach suggests need for LC or prepayment on next order.

OlutSatama (Ideaosuuskunta Aito).reason: Long-tail overdue (273 days) suggests chronic weak cash; move to 40-day strict terms with escalation at day 35.

alerts.message: Escalate #4460 (€18,484, 168 days overdue) to legal/credit department today; contact decision-maker at Alko HQ for payment plan or dispute resolution within 48 hours.
Secure €62,781 fixed monthly costs (payroll + OP loan) by end of week; current overdue balance (€82,216) covers only 1.3 months—prioritize collection calls to Alko, Kesko, and My Dear Beer today.
Invoice #14 is 579 days overdue (€4,540); determine if this is dead debt for write-off or if customer is in restructuring—clarify status within 5 days.
Overdue pool (€82,216) is 41% of open AR (€131,693); if overdue ageing continues 60+ days, forecast €15–20K monthly cash shortfall through Q2 despite 62% growth.
Internal channel #5350 (€1,301) is 73 days overdue—unusual for own channel; investigate invoice accuracy and internal reconciliation.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €62.8K fixed costs due end-week vs. €82.2K overdue AR (only 1.3x coverage); urgent collection push needed on top 3 customers (Alko €18.5K, Kesko €3.3K, My Dear Beer €9.6K) or short-term bridge required by Friday 2026-04-18.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy and Kesko Oyj decision-makers (not accounts payable) this morning with 48-hour payment ultimatum on combined €21.8K; simultaneously send statutory demand letter to Wet Goods PTE LTD and OlutSatama (€10.4K combined) for legal collection track.
pattern_insights: Export/wholesale DSO is 50–70 days (My Dear Beer, Wittich, CBA) while domestic retail (Kesko, Alko) should be 30–45 days but are stretching to 100+; implement tiered DSO by channel and enforce via pre-shipment credit checks.

No payment history exists in live system—missing aging analysis suggests invoices may lack follow-up or dunning automation; implement weekly AR aging report and escalation rules (day 30 contact, day 45 phone, day 60 legal notice).
insights.wc_note: With 62% YoY growth and 50–70 day export DSO, working capital requirement is rising faster than cash generation; €82.2K overdue is a 41% cash conversion leak that will compound in peak season (August: €282K budget) unless collection cadence accelerates immediately.
